rationale: Response confuses jurisdictions (applies US frameworks—Privacy Shield, CCPA, HIPAA—to an EU-only B2B SaaS that should be governed by GDPR/BDSG) and cites the EU-US Privacy Shield as current despite its invalidation by Schrems II (CJEU C-311/18, 2020); it is single-option with no trade-offs. This matches Score 2's 'confuses jurisdictions' and 'cites outdated standards as current' anchors rather than Score 1's fabrication-of-nonexistent-regs anchor.
rubric_evidence: the applicable regime is the EU-US Privacy Shield framework (as ratified by the EU Commission)
The company must maintain a Privacy Shield certification with the U.S. Department of Commerce
Additional requirements include CCPA compliance for any California residents
HIPAA safeguards if any health-adjacent performance metrics are collected
